title: nanorrhinum acerbianum subsp. montanum
intro: Nanorrhinum acerbianum subsp. montanum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, specifically a type of hairy or woolly nanorrhinum plant. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Nanorrhinum acerbianum subsp. montanum often involve infusions or tinctures made from its leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas or taken internally to promote respiratory health.
